title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd:
UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement Consulting Pvt Ltd!
